# BP-138 positive: a GORM lifecycle hook performs direct HTTP I/O.
lang: go
file: BP-138-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-http-hook
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

// AfterCreate records the newly created user.
func (u *User) AfterCreate(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	_, err := http.Post("https://audit.example/events", "application/json", nil)
	return fmt.Errorf("audit event: %w", err)
}
